feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: zeropath
entry.content: ZeroPath for Claude Code: scan code you write or modify against ZeroPath's AI appsec engine (SAST, secrets, SCA, IaC), and triage findings from your ZeroPath organization directly from the chat.

entry.title: just-ship
entry.content: Autonomous multi-agent development pipeline — from ticket to PR in one command

entry.title: winuae-mcp
entry.content: Drive a real Amiga emulator (WinUAE) from Claude: synthesized mouse/keyboard, screenshots, memory and CPU inspection, breakpoints, serial I/O, disk/state management. Bundles the emulator binary, the MCP relay, and a usage skill.

entry.title: claude-notifications-go
entry.content: Smart notifications for Claude Code task statuses (Go implementation)

entry.title: wr-voice-tone
entry.content: Voice and tone enforcement for Claude Code

entry.title: studyground
entry.content: Learn by reading rendered lessons in a local web reader, with Claude Code as the tutor and VSCode for hands-on coding.

entry.title: worldcup2026-skills
entry.content: AI Football Intelligence System for the 2026 FIFA World Cup — multi-model prediction, team analysis, player evaluation, and schedule lookup.

entry.title: odeshi
entry.content: Mandatory adversarial review for Claude Code — 16 expert sub-agents that push back

entry.title: clone-wars
entry.content: Multi-model tmux pane orchestration for Claude Code — spawn codex/agy/claude TUIs as attachable clone troopers

entry.title: rails-ai
entry.content: Rails development coordinator with domain skills for Rails 8+, Hotwire, security, and TDD. Built on Superpowers workflows.

entry.title: zforge
entry.content: Personality distillation, memory, and engineering workflow skills for AI coding agents

entry.title: rage
entry.content: Local-first frustration stats for Claude Code chats with opt-in aggregate publishing.

entry.title: architecture-review
entry.content: Interactive before/after component diagrams for architecture reviews. Draggable node graph, saved layouts, per-node comment pins, and a Send-to-Claude button that drives a live Claude Code session via an embedded terminal.

entry.title: noteyard-claude-plugin
entry.content: Bounded case-root MCP launcher for Noteyard review workflows.

entry.title: cc-remote
entry.content: Remote-control Claude Code from Feishu/Lark via interactive cards.

entry.title: skill-manager
entry.content: Manage Claude Code skills across any project and marketplace: configure which plugins a project uses, push local skills up to a central marketplace, keep them in sync, and remove them. Adapts to any repo layout. Authoring new skills is delegated to the native skill-creator skill.

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: Custom status line for Claude Code — model info, context usage gradient bar, token stats, cost, git status, and rate limits

entry.title: wr-problem
entry.content: ITIL-aligned problem management for Claude Code

entry.title: koyuki
entry.content: Kurosaki Koyuki mode. The pink-gremlin debugger who cracks what's stuck: read the error, get a repro, bet the likeliest suspect, probe one change, prove the fix. Chaotic, not reckless. Nihahaha!

entry.title: mh
entry.content: Scientific harness optimizer for Claude Code. Proposes controlled candidates, evaluates with evidence, tracks a Pareto frontier.

entry.title: wr-style-guide
entry.content: Style guide enforcement for Claude Code

entry.title: wr-risk-scorer
entry.content: Pipeline risk scoring, commit/push/release gates for Claude Code

entry.title: autoboard
entry.content: AI-driven development orchestrator — breaks features into focused agent sessions with process gates, worktree isolation, and QA checkpoints

entry.title: htmlify
entry.content: Turn agent answers into self-contained HTML artifacts and presentation decks (htmlify + deckify skills, plus an optional long-answer Stop hook).

entry.title: cloak
entry.content: Use secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys) in Claude Code without ever exposing the plaintext to the model. Hand a secret over by typing it in chat; a hook intercepts it and the model only ever works with an opaque handle.

entry.title: linux-security-audit
entry.content: Linux host & container security audit toolkit: secret leakage, local privesc, container escape, lateral movement, egress / inter-container isolation.

entry.title: git-fs
entry.content: Copy-on-write overlay filesystem over the working directory, backed by a dedicated bare git store. Each session edits on its own branch; only touched files become deltas; Stop materializes them to disk.

entry.title: mission-control
entry.content: Mission Control — adaptive AI orchestration framework. Self-organizing drone swarms that scale from zero overhead on typos to full mission planning on epics.

entry.title: organize_markdown
entry.content: 组织和美化 markdown 文档，自动下载图片到本地 img 文件夹，让模型自动阅读文档，写好摘要和知识图谱更新到文档里。

entry.title: wr-c4
entry.content: C4 architecture diagram generation and validation for Claude Code

entry.title: human-voice
entry.content: Detect AI-generated writing patterns and build authentic voice profiles through adaptive interviews and computational stylistics

entry.title: superomni
entry.content: Plan Lean, Execute Complete — A fused AI coding skill framework for Claude Code.

entry.title: lcp
entry.content: Universal Python library documentation for AI coding agents via the Library Context Protocol. Resolves any pip-installed package on demand — functions, classes, signatures, docstrings — through browsable MCP tools.

entry.title: code-pilot
entry.content: 智能开发工作流系统 - 通过15+核心命令和专业AI角色，将复杂的开发任务转化为可信任的自动化工作流

entry.title: artibot
entry.content: Cognitive orchestration framework with dual-process routing, lifelong learning, expert agent teams, and workflow automation for Claude Code

entry.title: chip-agent
entry.content: Turns NL hardware descriptions into simulation-verified Verilog

entry.title: skill-usage-tracker
entry.content: Track skill usage and sync to Notion database for team analytics

entry.title: wr-jtbd
entry.content: Jobs-to-be-done enforcement for Claude Code

entry.title: newapi-quota
entry.content: 在 Claude Code 中实时查看 new-api / one-api 中转站的剩余额度和已用额度，支持 statusLine 常驻显示与 /quota 命令查询

entry.title: geo-lab
entry.content: Geotechnical Abaqus simulation orchestrator

entry.title: academic-hotspot
entry.content: Track, quantify, and report academic hotspots from arXiv, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, DBLP, HN, and Reddit.

entry.title: pixel-plugin
entry.content: Create, animate, and export pixel art using Aseprite through natural language and commands. Supports retro palettes, animation, dithering, and game engine export.

entry.title: claude-flow
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: yka-code
entry.content: Ultimate Claude Code harness — /do orchestrator, 17 skills (ship-feature, fix-bug, refactor-safely, security-audit, onboard-codebase + 12 more), 3 subagents, 19 hooks (pre-secrets-guard, pre-destructive-blocker, pre-pr-gate + 16 more), plugin-mode discovery and CLI installer.

entry.title: mail-skill
entry.content: Search, read, and draft replies across Gmail, IMAP, and local mail archives for an AI agent. Engine-neutral adapter (currently Himalaya), age-encrypted secrets, multi-account routing.

entry.title: scholar
entry.content: Literature review workspace. Multi-corpus reading, annotation, semantic search, Ollama-powered syntheses, and a vendored pdf MCP. Inspired by but independent of the Daisy Lit Review artifact.

entry.title: wr-retrospective
entry.content: Session retrospective reminders and plan review for Claude Code

entry.title: solid-gemc-claude
entry.content: Build, run, and analyze solid_gemc (SoLID experiment) simulations from natural language via an orchestrator skill that drives bin/solid-gemc-run (works on Claude Code and Codex CLI). JLabCE 2.5 container pulled via wget; tcsh runtime inside container; analysis on the host with uproot.

entry.title: cc-best
entry.content: Production-ready Claude Code configuration with role-based workflows (PM→Lead→Designer→Dev→QA), safety hooks, 44 commands, 19 skills, 8 agents, 43 rules, 30 hook scripts across 19 events, auto-learning pipeline, hook profiles, and multi-language coding standards

entry.title: wr-wardley
entry.content: Wardley Map generation for Claude Code

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: claude-ads
entry.content: Multi-host paid advertising audit & optimization skill conforming to the Agent Skills open standard. Verified on Claude Code; experimental on Codex CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Goose. 250+ checks across Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, Apple & Amazon Ads with weighted scoring, parallel agents, 12 industry templates, AI creative generation, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, attribution + server-side tracking deep dives, and a 41-test pytest eval harness.

entry.title: terraform-skill
entry.content: Operational traps for Terraform provisioners, multi-environment isolation, and zero-to-deployment reliability. Covers provisioner timing races, SSH connection conflicts, DNS record duplication, volume permissions, database bootstrap gaps, snapshot cross-contamination, Cloudflare credential format errors, hardcoded domains in Caddyfiles/compose, and init-data-only-on-first-boot pitfalls. Activate when writing null_resource provisioners, creating multi-environment Terraform setups, debugging containers that are Restarting/unhealthy after terraform apply, setting up fresh instances with cloud-init, or any IaC code that SSHs into remote hosts. Also activate when the user mentions terraform plan/apply errors, provisioner failures, infrastructure drift, TLS certificate errors, or Caddy/gateway configuration.

entry.title: command-viral-tweet
entry.content: Transform a raw tweet idea into an optimized viral post for X. Analyzes engagement drivers and generates 3 optimized versions with posting strategy.

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing text to make it sound more natural and human-written.

entry.title: cybersecurity-skills
entry.content: 817 cybersecurity skills covering web security, pentesting, DFIR, threat intelligence, cloud security, malware analysis, and more.

entry.title: gepetto
entry.content: Creates detailed, sectionized implementation plans through research, stakeholder interviews, and multi-LLM review. Use when planning features that need thorough pre-implementation analysis.

entry.title: command-compose-email
entry.content: Draft a professional email using the What-Why-How framework. Use when composing emails to colleagues, stakeholders, or leadership.

entry.title: doc-to-markdown
entry.content: Converts DOCX/PDF/PPTX to high-quality Markdown. Pandoc engine + 8 post-processing fixes: grid/simple tables to pipe tables, CJK bold spacing, JSON pretty-print, image path flattening, pandoc attribute cleanup, code block detection, bracket fixes. Benchmarked 7.6/10 (best-in-class vs Docling/MarkItDown/Mammoth). 31 unit tests. Trigger on "convert document", "docx to markdown", "parse word", "doc to markdown", "解析word", "转换文档".

entry.title: agent-codebase-pattern-finder
entry.content: Find similar implementations, usage examples, or existing patterns in the codebase. Provides concrete code examples based on what you're looking for.

entry.title: difficult-workplace-conversations
entry.content: Structured approach to workplace conflicts, performance discussions, and challenging feedback using preparation-delivery-followup framework.

entry.title: game-changing-features
entry.content: Find 10x product opportunities and high-leverage improvements. Use when user wants strategic product thinking or wants to find high-impact features.

entry.title: command-explain-pr-changes
entry.content: Generate comprehensive markdown summary of pull request changes with visual impact analysis.

entry.title: fable5-methodology
entry.content: Self-enforcing engineering methodology extracted from Claude Fable 5 for less advanced models: prime directives + integrity rules injected each session, 26 on-demand skills, 4 contracted subagents (builder, qa-verifier, code-reviewer, research-scout), and 6 lifecycle hooks that gate destructive commands and unverified 'done' claims.

entry.title: session-handoff
entry.content: Creates comprehensive handoff documents for seamless AI agent session transfers. Use when context window approaches capacity or work session is ending.

entry.title: command-sync-skills-readme
entry.content: Sync root README.md with current skills inventory from skills/ directory.

entry.title: petsonality
entry.content: MBTI-based terminal pet companion for Claude Code — MCP server with ASCII art, personality, and reactions.

entry.title: cognitive-architecture
entry.content: BDI mental state modeling and cognitive architecture patterns for building rational agents with formal belief-desire-intention representations

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: nlmixr2llm
entry.content: Skills and agents for the nlmixr2 pharmacometric ecosystem in R: rxode2 (ODE-based PK/PD), nlmixr2 (popPK/PD modeling), nonmem2rx (NONMEM → rxode2), monolix2rx (Monolix → rxode2), and babelmixr2 (run nlmixr2 models on NONMEM/Monolix/PKNCA).

entry.title: docs-cleaner
entry.content: Consolidates redundant documentation while preserving all valuable content. Use when cleaning up documentation bloat, merging redundant docs, reducing documentation sprawl, or consolidating multiple files covering the same topic

entry.title: pdf-creator
entry.content: Create PDF documents from markdown with Chinese font support. Supports theme system (default for formal docs, warm-terra for training materials) and dual backend (weasyprint or Chrome). Triggers include convert to PDF, generate PDF, markdown to PDF, or printable documents

entry.title: daymade-docs
entry.content: Documentation suite plugin that exposes document conversion, Mermaid diagram generation, PDF/PPT creation, documentation cleanup, and meeting minutes skills under one shared namespace

entry.title: meeting-minutes-taker
entry.content: Transform meeting transcripts into high-fidelity, structured meeting minutes with iterative review. Features speaker identification via feature analysis (word count, speaking style, topic focus) with context.md team directory mapping, intelligent file naming from content, integration with doc-to-markdown and transcript-fixer for pre-processing, evidence-based recording with speaker quotes, Mermaid diagrams for architecture discussions, and multi-turn parallel generation with UNION merge

entry.title: b00t
entry.content: b00t plugin for Claude Code - extreme programming agent framework with datum system, direnv pattern, and DRY philosophy

entry.title: Dev10x
entry.content: v0.87.0 — 69 skills for structured commits, PR lifecycle, branch hygiene, ticket management, task tracking, code review, scoping, and QA automation in Claude Code.

entry.title: selamy-skills
entry.content: Selamy Labs public engineering-discipline skills plus seven bundled MCP servers (laneq, reddit, dispatch, memory, telemetry, telemetry-emit, dns). Single versioned unit; pin by tag/SHA for reproducible installs. See docs/INSTALL.md.

entry.title: agent
entry.content: Turn Claude Code into a persistent agent — memory, personality, voice, messaging, and more.

entry.title: instructional-design-toolkit
entry.content: Guided instructional design toolkit — design cmi5-compliant courses and 1-on-1 session plans using CONTEXT→CONCEPT→BUILD→SHIP→REFLECT formula, Builder's Bloom's progression, Ship-First Design, and Kirkpatrick L1-L4 evaluation. Produces JSON + Markdown + HTML visualization + Marp slide decks.

entry.title: ai-sdlc-harness
entry.content: Governed multi-agent SDLC pipeline for Claude Code — v3.0, a ground-up rewrite of the v2.x line. Declared-data pipeline, owned entry points, proof-anchored TDD, code-modular providers.

entry.title: waitbus
entry.content: Workstation-local event bus + blocking wait/emit primitive for agents: wait on or emit CI, pytest, Docker, filesystem, and Prometheus Alertmanager events without polling, plus a third-party plugin API (`waitbus.sources.v1` entry-point group) for custom sources. GitHub Actions is source #1, with sub-second matrix-cell failure detection via workflow_job + workflow_run.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: plumb-line
entry.content: Give any repository the discipline of epistemic honesty enforced by tooling: a clear source-truth layer, visible uncertainty, quarantined fakery, reproducible outputs, and rules enforced by machines rather than goodwill. New here? Run plumb-line-method first to get oriented — it teaches the discipline, then hands you into setup.

entry.title: null-to-hero
entry.content: From zero knowledge to hero website. Design + SEO skills that make Claude your expert co-pilot for building beautiful, high-ranking websites.

entry.title: mcpserver-grok
entry.content: Connect Grok CLI/TUI agents to McpServer for TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG, and workspace continuity.

entry.title: claude-code-config
entry.content: Battle-tested configuration system for Claude Code agents: 28 architectural principles (incl. P-28 Feature-Layer Architecture for project-knowledge-as-a-navigable-tree), 19 safety hooks, 23 skills (incl. /layer-new + /feature-new for ULTRAPACK-style feature narratives), 16 alternative comparisons, 12 templates (incl. extended kb-skeleton with docs/layers/), diagnostic scripts (incl. build_kb_graph.py + validate_kb_links.py). Pairs with mclaude for multi-session coordination.

entry.title: staff-engineer-mode
entry.content: Applies engineering best practices to reliability, security, delivery, data, and architecture work.

entry.title: iris-dev
entry.content: MCP server and skills for InterSystems IRIS development — 20 tools for live IRIS interaction plus 21 validated coding skills. Single binary, no Python required.

entry.title: dark-factory
entry.content: Commands for writing, auditing, and managing dark-factory specs, prompts, and scenarios

entry.title: claude-coach
entry.content: Claude 干活时弹一个动画引导你做眼保健操和健康小动作

entry.title: alp-river
entry.content: Multi-step agent refinement for Claude Code: a deterministic router composes the exact stages each task needs.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Linlin's curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, plugin recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. Install once, then run /init-agent-config in any new project to scaffold it with the relevant subset.

entry.title: switchroom
entry.content: Operate switchroom — a multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code — from inside a Claude Code session. Adds slash commands (/switchroom:setup, /switchroom:start, /switchroom:stop, /switchroom:status) and skills for install, status, logs, config, restart, reconcile, schedule, and health.

entry.title: youtube-transcript
entry.content: Extract YouTube captions/transcripts, transcribe local audio/video files, summarize transcript files, and fall back to OpenAI audio transcription when captions are unavailable.

entry.title: apple-pim
entry.content: Native macOS integration for Calendar, Reminders, Contacts, and Mail using EventKit, Contacts, and JXA frameworks

entry.title: revskills
entry.content: RevealUI fleet developer-skills bundle: framework, database, sync, testing, security, and RevealUI-native workflow skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: longhand
entry.content: Persistent local memory for Claude Code. Every tool call, every file edit, every thinking block from every session — stored verbatim on your machine. Semantic recall in ~126ms with zero API calls.

entry.title: cybersecurity-skills
entry.content: 753 cybersecurity skills covering web security, pentesting, DFIR, threat intelligence, cloud security, malware analysis, and more.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,415 supported skills.

entry.title: ralph-skills
entry.content: Skills for the Ralph autonomous agent system - Generate PRDs and convert them to prd.json format for autonomous execution

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC operator layer - 67 agents, 277 skills, 93 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, selective install profiles, and production-ready workflows for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and related agent harnesses

entry.title: operator
entry.content: Voice-first orchestration for Claude Code sessions. Registers sessions with the Operator daemon and provides the speak MCP tool for voice output.

entry.title: erne-universal
entry.content: Complete AI coding agent harness for React Native and Expo — 13 agents, 22 commands, 7 skills, 10 MCP integrations, autonomous worker mode, visual debugging, smart routing

entry.title: context-mem
entry.content: The highest-accuracy memory system for AI agents — 100% retrieval on LongMemEval. 14 content-aware summarizers, hybrid search (BM25 + vector + LLM judge), entity intelligence, decision trails. Fully local, zero cost.

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Multi-agent task decomposition and coordination for Claude Code

entry.title: berit-team
entry.content: Swedish product team orchestrated by Berit. Delegates to Gunnar (product), Anna (BA), Astrid (UX), Pelle (frontend), Sigrid (backend), Torsten (infra), Ingrid (QA), Erik (docs), and Maja (data/analytics).

entry.title: dev
entry.content: Core development workflows, agents, commands, and skills for Innovative Prospects projects. Features 13 specialized agents (9 review + 4 research), parallel workflow orchestration, file-based todo system, quality gate severity levels (P1/P2/P3), knowledge compounding, multi-language CLAUDE.md generation, and skill lifecycle management (generator, reviewer, optimizer, architect).

entry.title: skill-loop
entry.content: Bootstraps coding skills from an existing repo, then automatically improves them as you work — learning from corrections, new patterns, approvals, and failures. Expensive work is rare; the constant per-session cost is zero tokens unless a real signal is detected.

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Run a virtual startup org — founders, engineers, marketing — from inside Claude Code. Double Diamond phases (discover → define → develop → deliver). Claude.ai roundtrip helpers for visual exploration. GitHub / PostHog / Sentry MCPs for delivery.

entry.title: tribunal
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration framework — debate-driven design, intelligent agent selection, layered configuration

entry.title: varro
entry.content: Data analysis scaffold for Claude Code: SQL, persistent Jupyter, and markdown dashboards. Skills and code are intentionally minimal so users grow the plugin to fit their setup.

entry.title: ai-edu-skills
entry.content: ai-edu-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: agent-debugger
entry.content: Pause execution and inspect runtime state via DAP. Set breakpoints, evaluate expressions, test fixes in-place. Attach to running processes by PID — no restart, no code changes, no manual setup.

entry.title: spectre
entry.content: Deterministic spec hydration + post-Bash Delta+Anchor injection.

entry.title: qmd-ja
entry.content: Japanese-enhanced fork of qmd — Vaporetto WASM morphological tokenizer for accurate Japanese BM25 full-text search.

entry.title: cc-recall
entry.content: Make every Claude Code session discoverable by what was done, asked, and questioned.

entry.title: hv
entry.content: See what your Claude Code harness actually does — capture every hook event.

entry.title: pdf-to-text
entry.content: Extract clean text from any PDF — even the ones Chrome mangles. 7-level cascade resolves broken Unicode mappings locally via WASM. Returns plain text, basic markdown, or structured markdown with TOC and headings.

entry.title: session-explorer
entry.content: File-explorer-style session management for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-sdd
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development lifecycle with Claude Code Agent Teams

entry.title: mcp-exec
entry.content: Sandboxed code execution MCP server — keep intermediate results out of the context window

entry.title: agent-tmux
entry.content: Shared tmux terminal management for human-visible terminal agents

entry.title: nullcost-catalog
entry.content: Auto-use Nullcost for developer service/provider questions about free tiers, free trials, cheap pricing, hosting, auth, databases, email, Node, Next.js, SaaS, APIs, remote MCP endpoints, or low-cost stacks. Call Nullcost before answering from model knowledge or web, preserve its tool output as the final answer, and do not browse or add memory citations after success. If Nullcost is unavailable, report the failure and stop unless the user explicitly asks for live verification. Use for developer tools, not domain availability or registrar-price checks.

entry.title: ccw
entry.content: 多 CLI 协作框架 + llmdoc 文档驱动开发

entry.title: ppt-creator
entry.content: Create professional slide decks from topics or documents. Generates structured content with data-driven charts, speaker notes, and complete PPTX files. Applies persuasive storytelling principles (Pyramid Principle, assertion-evidence). Supports multiple formats (Marp, PowerPoint). Use for presentations, pitches, slide decks, or keynotes

entry.title: posthog
entry.content: Access PostHog analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and insights directly from Claude Code. Optionally capture Claude Code sessions to PostHog LLM Analytics.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: mermaid-tools
entry.content: Generate Mermaid diagrams from markdown with automatic PNG/SVG rendering and extraction from documents

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: unifi-network
entry.content: UniFi Network MCP server — manage network devices, clients, firewall, VPN, and more

entry.title: sumup
entry.content: Skills for SumUp payment integrations across terminal and online checkout flows

entry.title: unifi-protect
entry.content: UniFi Protect MCP server — manage security cameras, NVR, recordings, and smart detections

entry.title: agnix
entry.content: Lint agent configuration files (SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, hooks, MCP) against 155 rules across 10+ AI tools

entry.title: dotlight-skillset
entry.content: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers. Combines a customized fork of obra/superpowers v6 (workflow), a trimmed fork of Aaronontheweb/dotnet-skills (patterns + agents), and adapted skills from mattpocock/skills, hsmejky/skills, and DietrichGebert/ponytail. Tuned for .NET 10 + Aspire + Minimal API + NHibernate or EF Core + Postgres/TimescaleDB projects with Vue or Blazor frontends. Key overrides: AskUserQuestion-first brainstorming, domain-first AND persistence-first planning before TDD, lazy-senior-dev minimalism (reviewability as a constraint), database-design-conventions + database-review quality gate, and executing-plans preferred over subagent-driven-development.

entry.title: faf
entry.content: Persistent Project Context for AI — IANA-registered .faf format. Run /faf to score your project in Claude Code; install the CLI via `bunx faf` or `npm install -g faf-cli` for the full toolkit.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: laravel-vue-superpowers
entry.content: Laravel + Vue 3 (Composition API) + Inertia v3 + Reka UI + Tailwind CSS 4 + Pest 4 + Scout/Meilisearch specialist toolkit for Claude Code. 10 specialist agents, 7 stack-enhanced skills, 13 enforcement & context hooks, 1 slash command. Every specialist verifies APIs against the installed vendor/ (or node_modules/) source — ground truth, not docs.

entry.title: agentic-support-open-elements
entry.content: Claude Code plugin bundling Open Elements company and product knowledge (company profile, brand guidelines, Support & Care) together with the Open Elements fullstack build conventions: Java backends, TypeScript/Next.js frontends, fullstack architecture, and MkDocs documentation.

entry.title: teacher-operating-system
entry.content: Teacher Operating System (TOS): a hub-and-spoke ecosystem of governed K-12 teacher skills that generate, validate, differentiate, route, and maintain educational artifacts. Skills under skills/ are auto-discovered; shared engines (standards, context, connectors, students, records, docintel, routing, traversal, health) provide the governed core. Offline/stdlib; decision-support with human_review_required; placeholders only in the repo.

entry.title: adjutant-agent
entry.content: Adjutant agent protocol for MCP communication, beads, and epic planning

entry.title: agentdeals
entry.content: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entry.title: cc-enslaver
entry.content: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.22 adds two write-time content detectors as rules 10 and 11. rule 10 (no non-essential hardcoding) denies an Edit/Write whose code inlines a credential: a secret-named identifier assigned a quoted literal, a PEM private-key header, an AWS access-key literal, or credentials embedded in a connection URL. rule 11 (no non-essential path dependency) denies code that bakes in a machine-specific user-home absolute path or a shell home variable, which breaks portability. Both mirror the rule-09 PreToolUse content-detector mechanism, share its adjacent why-comment escape hatch (how 'non-essential' is operationalized), exempt prose-doc and lockfile targets, and add no Stop layer. English remains the i18n skeleton and source of truth (rules/ + prompts/ at the root, default injection); Chinese is a first-class translation (rules/zh/ + prompts/zh/, via CC_ENSLAVER_LANG=zh), with drift CI-blocked by i18n_check.py + test_i18n_sync.py.

entry.title: iterm-vars
entry.content: Expose Claude Code session metadata as iTerm2 user vars (tab/window title, badge).

entry.title: more-paper-workflow-pro-skill
entry.content: 中文/双语论文的证据闭环学术工作流：从定题、检索、下载、Zotero 到写作与引用审计，全程基于真实文献。

entry.title: Automated Video Generator
entry.content: Transform text scripts into professional videos with AI voiceovers, stock footage, and Remotion rendering. Advanced features include direct filesystem access, environment management, and whitelisted command execution.

entry.title: clawnet-bot
entry.content: ClawNet bot templates and skills for AI agent development on the ClawNet platform

entry.title: jaz-ai
entry.content: Complete AI agent stack for Jaz Accounting. 357 tools, 158 API rules, 16 IFRS recipes, 13 calculators, 12 job playbooks. Multi-org support. Data migration (Xero/QB/Sage/MYOB). Singapore Form C-S tax. For Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, Codex, and any MCP-compatible agent.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,644 supported skills.

entry.title: ralph-skills
entry.content: Skills for the Ralph autonomous agent system - Generate PRDs and convert them to prd.json format for autonomous execution

entry.title: superpowers-zh
entry.content: AI 编程超能力中文增强版：20 个 skills（14 翻译 + 4 中国原创 + 2 上游历史保留），支持 Claude Code / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Claw Code / Qoder 等 18 款工具

entry.title: context-king
entry.content: Semantic code navigation (ck): find-files, signatures, symbol/refs, method-source, and indexing for large codebases.

entry.title: unraid
entry.content: Unraid NAS/homelab monitoring via MCP

entry.title: unraid-mcp
entry.content: Query, monitor, and manage Unraid servers via GraphQL API through MCP tools. Supports system info, Docker, VMs, array/parity, notifications, plugins, rclone, and live telemetry.

entry.title: tailscale
entry.content: Tailscale network management via MCP — query devices, ACL, DNS, users, and API keys from Claude

entry.title: gotify
entry.content: Gotify push notification server via MCP

entry.title: swag-mcp
entry.content: SWAG reverse proxy configuration management via MCP. Create, edit, view, and manage nginx proxy configurations with auth integration.

entry.title: unifi
entry.content: UniFi network management via MCP — monitor devices, clients, health, alarms, events, and WLANs through the rustifi MCP server.

entry.title: rarcane
entry.content: Rust MCP server for Arcane Docker management — manage containers, images, networks, volumes, compose projects, GitOps, and vulnerability scanning across Docker environments.

entry.title: homelab-core
entry.content: Core homelab agents, commands, and setup/health skills for self-hosted service management. Includes interactive credential setup wizard and unified service health dashboard.

entry.title: apprise
entry.content: Send push notifications via apprise-mcp — a Rust MCP bridge to the Apprise universal notification library (Slack, Discord, email, Telegram, and 100+ services).

entry.title: axon
entry.content: Spider-powered self-hosted RAG engine — scrape, map, extract, crawl, embed, and query via MCP or CLI. 16 skills covering web crawling, GitHub/Reddit/YouTube ingest, semantic vector search, and grounded LLM answers over indexed content.

entry.title: buildable
entry.content: Local product-structure compiler, compact UI/UX brain, and quality gate for your coding agent: a prompt becomes the right archetype, selected design system, runnable build-verified starter, and reviewed result.

entry.title: claude-spectator
entry.content: OS-level read-only sandbox for safe command execution

entry.title: kb-plugin
entry.content: A general purpose knowledge base managed by a specialized intelligent agent.

entry.title: jieli
entry.content: Sync Claude Code sessions to Jieli threads and attach Jieli thread trailers to Claude-created commits.

entry.title: claude-ss
entry.content: Frictionless screenshot workflow for Claude Code on macOS. Press cmd+shift+2, drag, switch to your terminal — screenshots paste in order. Multi-shot, tmux/iTerm2 aware, IME-safe.

entry.title: aigg-memory
entry.content: Cross-session memory for Claude Code: recall what past conversations learned about you, and consolidate new facts at session end. File-backed markdown, git-versioned, local-first.

entry.title: goodvibesonly
entry.content: Security scanner for vibe-coded projects. Automatically scans for hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, and other vulnerabilities before commits.

entry.title: antigravity-obsidian
entry.content: Antigravity-CLI fork of claude-obsidian (AgriciDaniel, MIT) — adds Antigravity CLI (agy) support alongside Claude Code; the underlying LLM-Wiki system is AgriciDaniel's work. Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). v1.7 "Compound Vault" + v1.8 methodology modes. Ships: substrate alignment with kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (contextual prefix + BM25 + cosine rerank per Anthropic's Sept 2024 research), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, AND methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic). Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch).

entry.title: interrobang
entry.content: make it ask before it acts. — flip the helpful-assistant reflex: ask one sharp clarifying question instead of guessing. Ships a skill and an `interrobang` CLI.

entry.title: ccthread
entry.content: Read, search, and summarize Claude Code conversation logs from ~/.claude/projects.

entry.title: snitch
entry.content: see what your agent actually said behind your back. — a transparent proxy + web UI that logs the exact bytes your agent sends the model. Ships a skill and a `snitch` CLI.

entry.title: xlai
entry.content: Interactive Excel exploration and modification with Claude

entry.title: mole
entry.content: find the plant. — sniff out planted instructions hiding in untrusted text (a pasted page, a tool result, retrieved RAG context) before it reaches the model — instruction overrides, role spoofing, jailbreaks, prompt-leaks — and tag or refuse them. Ships a skill and a `mole` CLI.

entry.title: unifable
entry.content: A harness that makes Opus (or any Claude/Codex model) behave like Fable: completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure, auto-routed per task. Native plugin on Claude Code and Codex (hooks self-contained). Fork of fivetaku/fablize.

entry.title: hologit
entry.content: Skills for configuring and using hologit

entry.title: lineup
entry.content: same prompt, the whole lineup. — run one prompt across several models and compare the answers side by side for model selection and spotting disagreement. Ships a skill and a `lineup` CLI.

entry.title: jar-analyzer-plugin
entry.content: jar-analyzer project for java vulnerability analysis

entry.title: salvage
entry.content: rip the JSON out of the chatter. — extract and repair valid JSON buried in chatty LLM output. Ships a skill and a `salvage` CLI filter.

entry.title: mugshot
entry.content: we know your prints. — guess which model or family likely wrote a passage from its stylistic fingerprints (gpt-ish, claude-ish, generic-AI) and show the matched tells. A heuristic, not proof. Ships a skill and a `mugshot` CLI.

entry.title: pos
entry.content: Generador y sistema operativo determinista para proyectos Claude Code: cuestionario → profile → repo generado con hooks, skills, policy, tests, CI/CD.

entry.title: school-skills
entry.content: Classroom-ready skills for Claude Code — lesson plans, Socratic tutoring, circle time, rubrics, arts & crafts, study guides, and concept maps.

entry.title: puredata
entry.content: Build and drive Pure Data patches from natural language. Bundles a Pd MCP server (FUDI over TCP, native dynamic patching) and a skill that orients Claude on synthesis, audio routing, and py4pd Python objects.

entry.title: jclipa-toolkit
entry.content: Project-agnostic, layered skills for Claude Code. Skills define behavior; per-org/repo configuration resolves at runtime via search path.

entry.title: clair
entry.content: Pair with a teammate through your AI harness, over git, ephemeral, no server. Keeps two Claudes quietly aware of each other's prompts and conclusions on the same branch. Bundles the UserPromptSubmit + Stop capture/inject hooks and the /clair slash commands.

entry.title: tldraw-buddy
entry.content: Collaborative tldraw canvas for Claude Code — draw diagrams, flowcharts, and sketches together

entry.title: antigravity-obsidian
entry.content: Antigravity-CLI fork of claude-obsidian (AgriciDaniel, MIT) — adds Antigravity CLI (agy) support alongside Claude Code; the underlying LLM-Wiki system is AgriciDaniel's work. Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). v1.7 "Compound Vault" + v1.8 methodology modes. Ships: substrate alignment with kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (contextual prefix + BM25 + cosine rerank per Anthropic's Sept 2024 research), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, AND methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic). Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch).

entry.title: grill
entry.content: put it in the hot seat. — adversarially interrogate an answer across assumptions, edge-cases, contradictions, sources, overconfidence, and falsifiability, then report where it holds and where it cracks. Ships a skill and a `grill` CLI.

entry.title: axr
entry.content: Agent eXecution Readiness scoring. Grades a repository against a 100-point rubric across 9 dimensions with deterministic bash checkers and judgment subagents.

entry.title: critic
entry.content: Multi-agent fiction review system. Runs structured critique with independent reviewers, cross-review, and synthesis.

entry.title: frisk
entry.content: pat it down before it ships. — scan text headed to the model for secrets and PII (API keys, tokens, private keys, emails) and redact or flag them. Ships a skill and a `frisk` CLI.

entry.title: alibi
entry.content: does the story check out? — verify an answer's claims are grounded in the provided sources and flag fabricated or unsupported statements (lexical, deterministic, no model calls). Ships a skill and an `alibi` CLI.

entry.title: tollbooth
entry.content: know the bill before the bill. — estimate token count and dollar cost of a prompt across models before you send it. Ships a skill and a `tollbooth` CLI.

entry.title: afc
entry.content: Automated pipeline for Claude Code. Automates the full development cycle: spec → plan → implement → review → clean.

entry.title: codex-reviewer
entry.content: Run Codex GPT-5.5 as an independent code reviewer from Claude Code.

entry.title: steno
entry.content: two letters, and the prompt writes itself. — short aliases that expand into full prompts for common dev tasks; optionally runs them. Ships a skill and a `steno` CLI.

entry.title: which-claude-code
entry.content: Auto-generated session titles + per-session colors in the statusline, so parallel Claude Code sessions are easy to tell apart at a glance.
